pageContext.name: Izuku Midoriya vs Stain
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Takara Tomy present the Izuku Midoriya vs Stain Collectible Figure!  This collectible figure stands at 11.81', including the detailed base and effects, and features the main character of the hit anime series My Hero Academia Izuku Midoriya, also known as Deku, fighting the villain Stain.  Both characters are seen wearing their original costumes and ready to go head to head in a fight! Don't miss your chance to add this collectible figure to your anime collection today!
